text: The Bizarre Titan is a unique enemy that can appear during story and scout mision. They are a reskinned variant of the Female, Armored, Beast, Jaw and Cart Titan with the same abilities as the original. These enemies can appear as Dire-Subjugation targets once set conditions are met or as main bosses in missions. A variant resembling the Colossal Titan is also seen in one of the final scout missions.
